description: Dynamic bridge — 2026-04-20 session (Monday). Iran ceasefire extension "in principle agreement" reported. April 21 (Tuesday) ceasefire expiry = 1 trading day after Monday. Brent collapsed to $96.22 (-3.19%).

market_regime.key_risk: April 21 (Tuesday) ceasefire expiry = 1 trading day after Monday open. Ceasefire extension reported "in principle" but not yet formally agreed. Iran IRGC counter-threats on Gulf/Red Sea shipping still active. Weekend event risk.
